headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — ideal day to make deep progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079), your only active ticket.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues so tomorrow's brief has live data
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken — you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance the 'Generated evaluations - clarify no ground truth' design doc (AE-1079)
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket, no due date set yet but evals is a key 26.4 deliverable tracked in Big Rock OKRs; zero-meeting day is your best window

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock Agents bi-weekly TR page for latest evals and agent adoption context to feed into AE-1079
must_make_progress.why: Confluence OKR page references evals demos and key 26.4 deliverables — align your design doc to current priorities

must_communicate_with.about: Clarify technical constraints and approach for generated evals without ground truth — needed for AE-1079 design doc
Sync on pattern updates (DeepRAG, BatchTransform) and how validation patterns intersect with no-ground-truth evals

must_report_status.topic: AE-1079 progress and expected completion timeline
must_report_status.note: Ticket has no due date — proactively set one and communicate it before the next bi-weekly TR

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix credentials ASAP.
Snowflake integration is down (empty password) — no product metrics available. Fix credentials ASAP.
AE-1079 has no due date — risk of it drifting; set a target date today.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in OKRs — monitor for potential spillover into your evals workstream.
No emails, Slack activity, or calendar for 3 days — unusually quiet; confirm nothing is being missed (filters, permissions).

outcomes.business_impact: No escalations resolved or decisions surfaced today due to data source outages — restoring Salesforce and Snowflake access is prerequisite to any data-driven impact.
outcomes.product_adoption: No adoption metrics available; advancing the no-ground-truth evals design doc (AE-1079) directly supports the 26.4 evals deliverable which is a tracked adoption driver for Agents.

slack_summary: Clear calendar day — best opportunity to make real progress on AE-1079 (no-ground-truth evals design doc), your only active ticket. Top urgent items: (1) draft or significantly advance that design doc, and (2) fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you regain visibility on escalations and metrics. Zero meetings today.
